SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through the Oct. 14, 2002 game; Oct. 18, 2002 Hudgens Academy game log
SourceNote: Published rushing and scoring leaders totals through St. Andrew's Oct. 14, 2002 game, plus Jeff Smith's exact 21-carry, 220-yard, one-touchdown line from the Oct. 18 Hudgens Academy game. All-purpose yards combine the adjusted rushing total with known receiving and punt return scoring-play yardage.

SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through first two games; Sept. 16, Sept. 27, Oct. 14, and Oct. 18, 2002 game logs
SourceNote: Combines the published first-two-games passing leaders total with the Sept. 16 Hilton Head Prep team passing line credited to Davy Clay, his Sept. 27 Thomas Heyward passing line, the Oct. 14 King's Academy team passing line credited to Clay, and the Oct. 18 Hudgens Academy team passing line credited to Clay by inference from his quarterback role and the surrounding season passing adjustments. Completions and attempts omit Sept. 27 because no comp-att line was reported for that game; Oct. 4 passing remains uncredited.

SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through first four games; Sept. 16, Sept. 27, Oct. 14, and Oct. 18, 2002 game logs
SourceNote: Coastal Empire football statistics interceptions leaders through St. Andrew's first four games; later passing and scoring totals are carried by the companion Davy Clay adjustment and game logs.

SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through the Oct. 4, 2002 game; Oct. 14 and Oct. 18, 2002 scoring summaries
SourceNote: Published tackles leaders total through St. Andrew's Oct. 4, 2002 game; Oct. 14 and Oct. 18 scoring summaries add tracked scoring games but no new tackle splits.

SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through the Oct. 18, 2002 game
SourceNote: Published punting leaders total through St. Andrew's Oct. 18, 2002 game. This supersedes the 18 punts accounted for by the current game-log totals; punting yardage is computed from the published punts and average. Interception totals are carried from the prior leaders and scoring summaries.

SourceCitation: Savannah Morning News, Coastal Empire football statistics through the Oct. 14, 2002 game; Oct. 18, 2002 Hudgens Academy scoring summary
SourceNote: Published kicking leaders total through St. Andrew's Oct. 14, 2002 game, plus four Josh Smith PAT kicks in the Oct. 18 Hudgens Academy game. Total points include Smith's known two-point run in the Oct. 14 King's Academy game.
